description: 12Go is an online travel booking service focused on ground and regional transport such as trains, buses, ferries, flights, vans, and taxis. It also operates an affiliate program for partners who refer bookings to 12Go.
summary: 12Go exposes a public MCP server at `https://mcp.12go.asia/chatgpt-sse?...`; its affiliate site mentions partner tools including an API, but no public developer documentation, auth details, or machine-readable API spec were found on 12go.asia.
